ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ts_metadata" (
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the time series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time series */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the time series (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time series */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the time series data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The specific source or API from which the data is fetched */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* The user who last modified the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ts_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the time series */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., mean, std dev, skewness) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* A description of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* The category or type of the feature (e.g., statistical, spectral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A description of the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the model */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* The last date and time the model was trained */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model */,
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the time series */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the forecast */,
  "forecast_confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval of the forecast */,
  "forecast_description" TEXT /* A description of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action performed during the access (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* A description of the result */,
  "result_timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the time series */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment for the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* A description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_by" TEXT /* The user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment for the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* A description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_by" TEXT /* The user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecast */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment for the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* A description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_by" TEXT /* The user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_models" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_datasets" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the time series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "ts_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models_features" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features_values" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feature */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_features" (
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the time series */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ts_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_values" (
  "ts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the time series */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the time series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ts_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date of the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message of the error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* The type of error (e.g., data, model, system) */,
  "error_severity" TEXT /* The severity of the error (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)
